scope: Real Worker performance, cancellation and cleanup evidence for the documented 4096x4096 grid budget.

memory.cleanupMethod: release result reference, Bun.gc(true), one event-loop turn

rejected: Wrong worker path: the smoke uses the default real Worker client and verifies every output operation order.
Silent cancellation: aborting on the first chroma progress event rejects with the canonical cancelled error in under the feedback budget.
Transfer regression: the 4096x4096 request source buffer is detached after transfer.
Unbounded memory: heap delta and post-result cleanup delta remain well below the documented 512 MB gate; cleanup is measured explicitly.
Partial result drift: all 256 cells are returned as 64x64 outputs with no warnings.
adversarialAutopsy.boundary: Pipeline round-trip/reset remains G5-05; staged results and export journeys remain G6/G7.
